Plan to Promote Transparency and Vision to Your Employees:
• 	Promote your vision to the entire business the day you take over the business.
• 	Have a list of your employees (if you have a lot of employees, you can meet
them in teams.)
• 	Make time to meet them and individually understand their goals.
• 	Promote your vision to them and help them see how it can help them
accomplish the goals they shared.
• 	Promote how you’ll be there to support them. And that the ultimate goal is to
not be dependent on them… and for them to not be dependent on you.
• 	Promote the fact that everyone will have KPIs which will be expected and
monitored.
• 	Promote the shared outcome of accomplishing your shared vision.
• 	Promote the culture you want -- of a fast attack speed, taking responsibility,
and coming with solutions instead of problems.
Plan to Promote to Your Clients, Customers & Vendors:
• 	Immediately promote your vision for continuity and even better service for
existing clients/customers and vendors (ideally, promote that vision with the
Your Promotion Plan After Taking Over
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

previous owner and get that previous owner's endorsement. Especially where
they have a strong client, customer or vendor relationship.)
• 	Within the first week of ownership, call your clients to check in on everything.
• 	Send email and physical mail to promote the change and show why it’s
positive. Promote the vision for the future and why it means their results will
get even better.
• 	Leverage the opportunity as a good reason “why” to create special offers and
generate more business because of the new and exciting changes taking place
in the business.
• 	Develop a social media presence and frequently tell your clients and the world
what your business is up to… where it’s going next… and who you’re looking
to help.
